content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "弄丟錢包",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你怎麼了？看起來心情不好。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zěnme le? Kàn qǐlái xīnqíng bù hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zen3me le5? Kan4 qi3lai2 xin1qing2 bu4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "What's wrong with you? You look upset.",
          "translation_ko": "무슨 일 있어? 기분이 안 좋아 보여."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "糟糕，我弄丟錢包了。",
          "pinyin": "Zāogāo, wǒ nòng diū qiánbāo le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zao1gao1, wo3 nong4 diu1 qian2bao1 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Oh no, I lost my wallet.",
          "translation_ko": "큰일 났어, 지갑을 잃어버렸어."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "真的嗎？發生什麼事？",
          "pinyin": "Zhēn de ma? Fāshēng shénme shì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhen1 de5 ma5? Fa1sheng1 shen2me shi4?",
          "translation_en": "Really? What happened?",
          "translation_ko": "정말? 무슨 일이 있었어?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我剛才去便利商店買東西，結果忘記拿錢包。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ gāngcái qù biànlì shāngdiàn mǎi dōngxi, jiéguǒ wàngjì ná qiánbāo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 gang1cai2 qu4 bian4li4 shang1dian4 mai3 dong1xi5, jie2guo3 wang4ji4 na2 qian2bao1.",
          "translation_en": "I went to the convenience store to buy something just now, and as a result, I forgot to take my wallet.",
          "translation_ko": "아까 편의점에 물건 사러 갔는데, 결국 지갑을 안 가져왔어."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你有回去找嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ yǒu huí qù zhǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 you3 hui2 qu4 zhao3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Did you go back to look for it?",
          "translation_ko": "다시 돌아가서 찾아봤어?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有，可是店員說沒有看到。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, kěshì diànyuán shuō méiyǒu kàndào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, ke3shi4 dian4yuan2 shuo1 mei2you3 kan4dao4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, but the clerk said they didn't see it.",
          "translation_ko": "응, 그런데 직원이 못 봤다고 했어."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那怎麼辦？裡面有重要的東西嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nà zěnme bàn? Lǐmiàn yǒu zhòngyào de dōngxi ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 zen3me ban4? Li3mian4 you3 zhong4yao4 de5 dong1xi5 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Then what to do? Are there important things inside?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 어쩌려고? 안에 중요한 물건 있어?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有悠遊卡和信用卡。我已經打電話給銀行處理了。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu yōuyóukǎ hé xìnyòngkǎ. Wǒ yǐjīng dǎ diànhuà gěi yínháng chǔlǐ le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 you1you2ka3 he2 xin4yong4ka3. Wo3 yi3jing1 da3 dian4hua4 gei3 yin2hang2 chu3li3 le5.",
          "translation_en": "There's an EasyCard and a credit card. I've already called the bank to handle it.",
          "translation_ko": "유유카드랑 신용카드가 있어. 벌써 은행에 전화해서 처리했어."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the person lose?",
          "question_ko": "그 사람은 무엇을 잃어버렸습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Phone", "Wallet", "Keys"],
          "options_ko": ["휴대폰", "지갑", "열쇠"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of regret and worry.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a story about a time you lost something important. Use words like 弄丟, 結果, 處理."
    },
    {
      "title": "錯過火車",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你怎麼遲到了？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zěnme chídào le?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zen3me chi2dao4 le5?",
          "translation_en": "Why are you late?",
          "translation_ko": "왜 늦었어?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "抱歉，我錯過火車了。",
          "pinyin": "Bàoqiàn, wǒ cuòguò huǒchē le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bao4qian4, wo3 cuo4guo4 huo3che1 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Sorry, I missed the train.",
          "translation_ko": "미안해, 기차를 놓쳤어."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "為什麼？發生什麼事？",
          "pinyin": "Wèishénme? Fāshēng shénme shì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wei4shen2me5? Fa1sheng1 shen2me shi4?",
          "translation_en": "Why? What happened?",
          "translation_ko": "왜? 무슨 일이 있었어?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "因為路上塞車，所以來不及到車站。",
          "pinyin": "Yīnwèi lùshàng sāichē, suǒyǐ láibují dào chēzhàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yin1wei4 lu4shang4 sai1che1, suo3yi3 lai2bu4ji2 dao4 che1zhan4.",
          "translation_en": "Because there was a traffic jam on the road, so I couldn't make it to the station in time.",
          "translation_ko": "길이 막혀서 역에 제때 도착하지 못했어."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那後來你怎麼來的？",
          "pinyin": "Nà hòulái nǐ zěnme lái de?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 hou4lai2 ni3 zen3me lai2 de5?",
          "translation_en": "Then how did you come later?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 나중에 어떻게 왔어?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我搭下一班火車，幸好只晚半個小時。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ dā xià yī bān huǒchē, xìnghǎo zhǐ wǎn bàn gè xiǎoshí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 da1 xia4 yi1 ban1 huo3che1, xing4hao3 zhi3 wan3 ban4 ge4 xiao3shi2.",
          "translation_en": "I took the next train; luckily, it was only half an hour late.",
          "translation_ko": "다음 기차를 탔는데, 다행히 30분밖에 늦지 않았어."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒關係，下次早一點出門就好了。",
          "pinyin": "Méiguānxì, xià cì zǎo yīdiǎn chūmén jiù hǎo le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2guan1xi4, xia4 ci4 zao3 yi1dian3 chu1men2 jiu4 hao3 le5.",
          "translation_en": "It's okay, just leave a bit earlier next time.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아, 다음에는 조금 일찍 나가면 돼."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why did the person miss the train?",
          "question_ko": "그 사람이 기차를 놓친 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Traffic jam", "Overslept", "Wrong platform"],
          "options_ko": ["교통 체증", "늦잠", "잘못된 승강장"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the explanation of the cause and effect.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe a time you were late. Use 因為, 所以, 結果, 幸好."
    },
    {
      "title": "送錯餐的故事",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "不好意思，這是你的牛肉麵嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, zhè shì nǐ de niúròumiàn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3yi4si5, zhe4 shi4 ni3 de5 niu2rou4mian4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, is this your beef noodle soup?",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 이게 손님의 소고기 국수인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不是，我點的是滷肉飯。",
          "pinyin": "Bùshì, wǒ diǎn de shì lǔròufàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4shi4, wo3 dian3 de5 shi4 lu3rou4fan4.",
          "translation_en": "No, I ordered braised pork rice.",
          "translation_ko": "아니요, 저는 루로우판을 주문했어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "糟糕，我送錯了。對不起！",
          "pinyin": "Zāogāo, wǒ sòng cuò le. Duìbùqǐ!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zao1gao1, wo3 song4 cuo4 le5. Dui4bu4qi3!",
          "translation_en": "Oh no, I delivered the wrong order. I'm sorry!",
          "translation_ko": "큰일 났네요, 잘못 가져왔어요. 죄송합니다!"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "沒關係，那我的滷肉飯呢？",
          "pinyin": "Méiguānxì, nà wǒ de lǔròufàn ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2guan1xi4, na4 wo3 de5 lu3rou4fan4 ne5?",
          "translation_en": "It's okay, but where is my braised pork rice?",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 그럼 제 루로우판은요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "我馬上去廚房確認，請等一下。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ mǎshàng qù chúfáng quèrèn, qǐng děng yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 ma3shang4 qu4 chu2fang2 que4ren4, qing3 deng3 yi1xia4.",
          "translation_en": "I'll go to the kitchen to check right away, please wait a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "바로 주방에 확인하러 갈게요, 잠시만 기다려 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，麻煩你了。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, máfan nǐ le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, ma2fan5 ni3 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you for your trouble.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 번거롭게 해드려서 죄송합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "結果你的滷肉飯已經做好了，我馬上幫你換。",
          "pinyin": "Jiéguǒ nǐ de lǔròufàn yǐjīng zuò hǎo le, wǒ mǎshàng bāng nǐ huàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jie2guo3 ni3 de5 lu3rou4fan4 yi3jing1 zuo4 hao3 le5, wo3 ma3shang4 bang1 ni3 huan4.",
          "translation_en": "It turns out your braised pork rice is already done; I'll swap it for you right away.",
          "translation_ko": "알고 보니 손님의 루로우판은 이미 다 됐네요, 바로 바꿔 드릴게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer actually order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 실제로 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Beef noodle soup", "Braised pork rice", "Fried rice"],
          "options_ko": ["소고기 국수", "루로우판", "볶음밥"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line, focusing on the polite apology and the explanation of the mistake.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a story about a wrong order at a restaurant. Use 送錯, 結果, 換."
    }
  ]
}
